title: MCPMark: A Benchmark for Stress-Testing Realistic and Comprehensive MCP Use
reason_to_include: ICLR 2026 conference benchmark with 127 stateful MCP tasks and released execution tooling；结果由 Task-specific programmatic scripts check final state across MCP tool environments 判定。
decision_reason: 主来源、发布日期与程序化验证契约均已在候选审计中核对。
